_meta._comment_zh: 占位文件:值暂用英文,待人工翻译。合规/法律文案(auth.consent.*、account.delete.*、recognize.disclaimer、goal.disclaimer)禁止机翻,须人工把关。

error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
error.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.

errors.unauthorized: Session expired, please log in again
errors.forbidden: You are not allowed to perform this action
errors.validation: Invalid input, please check and retry

password.weak: Weak password. Use letters and numbers.

consent.label: I have read and agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
consent.required: Please read and accept the Terms and Privacy Policy first

text.placeholder: e.g. a bowl of beef noodles + a fried egg

recognize.disclaimer: Calorie and nutrition figures are AI estimates and may be inaccurate. For reference only; not medical or health advice.

error.failed: Couldn't recognize this image. Try another photo or add manually.

limit.reached: Daily recognition limit reached. Please try again tomorrow.

goal.title: Daily calorie goal
goal.disclaimer: Estimate is for reference only, adjustable, and not medical advice.

camera.title: Camera access
camera.body: To take photos of your food for AI analysis. Used only when you take a photo.

photos.title: Photo access
photos.body: To pick a food photo for analysis. Only the photo you select is read.

notify.title: Enable reminders
notify.body: Helps you build a logging habit. You can turn it off anytime.

delete.title: Delete your account?
delete.warning: Once deleted, your meal logs, photos, profile, and goals are permanently and irreversibly erased and cannot be recovered.
delete.success: Your account and data have been permanently deleted
delete.web: You can also delete your account on the web

photo.retention: Your food photos are used only for instant AI analysis. Original images are not retained long-term; we keep only the recognized result data.
